title: Anime News Network Article Understanding Evangelion
display_title: Anime News Network Article Understanding Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Anime News Network Article "Understanding Evangelion"             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Jun 21, 2004 4:22 pm This article is a must-read for anyone who isn't completely positive of the psychology of Eva, and it also manages to outline many of the complex themes found within.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 21, 2004 4:33 pm http://www.animenewsnetwork.com/feature.php?id=14 Its a decent article, I enjoyed reading it way back when, last I checked I had it in the written statements section.

[]:             Quote Post by Dennis » Mon Jun 21, 2004 5:57 pm Are there any other great EVA resouce sites besides EvaMonkey and EvaOtaku? Also, are there any other reference books besides the heavily contested and debated RCB?

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Mon Jun 21, 2004 7:19 pm thatstoodamnbad wrote: Are there any other great EVA resouce sites besides EvaMonkey and EvaOtaku? Also, are there any other reference books besides the heavily contested and debated RCB?

[]:             Quote Post by yjs » Mon Jun 21, 2004 7:42 pm That was a very interesting article. I liked the analysis of Shinji as a 'tragic hero', since I just did a big assignment on Macbeth being a 'tragic hero'. It also outlines the flaws of Eva, which is good to see.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Mon Jun 21, 2004 7:48 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: last I checked I had it in the written statements section.

[]:             Quote Post by Quiddity » Mon Jun 21, 2004 10:32 pm thatstoodamnbad wrote: Are there any other great EVA resouce sites besides EvaMonkey and EvaOtaku? Also, are there any other reference books besides the heavily contested and debated RCB?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 21, 2004 10:46 pm thatstoodamnbad wrote: Are there any other great EVA resouce sites besides EvaMonkey and EvaOtaku? Also, are there any other reference books besides the heavily contested and debated RCB?

[]: Re: Anime News Network Article "Understanding Evangelion"             Quote Post by Xx_SuicideCutie_xX » Fri Jan 30, 2026 2:09 pm You still active perchance

[]: Re: Anime News Network Article "Understanding Evangelion"             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sat Jan 31, 2026 9:17 am Legendary necroposting (I love that article!!!)
